main.description: A first-class artifact node: a concrete thing that flows through a workflow (a RAW file, a negative strip, a print, a video clip). Reifying artifacts turns a workflow into a true provenance DAG where stages are edges and artifacts are nodes, and supports multi-input stages (a print from a negative plus a mask).

photo.description: The published photo AT-URI, when this artifact is a published photo (e.g. social.grain.photo).

intermediate.description: app.graycard.instance.intermediate, when the artifact is a persistent physical object.

parents.description: Artifacts this one was derived from (lineage edges).

producedBy.description: The app.graycard.process.* session that produced this artifact.
